history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible up ahead and to the right. I am facing upward, with a free cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D, so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the row of the goal. Turning is unnecessary right now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible to the right and slightly ahead, but I am currently facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is free, while turning right would face lava immediately. The safest progress is to move forward into the open cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall at row 06 column D, so moving forward is blocked. To my right, there is a safe floor cell at row 07 column E, and the goal is visible one more cell beyond that at row 07 column F. The best next step is to turn right so I can move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly ahead of me two cells forward in the same column. The cell immediately in front is an empty floor, so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal. The lava is to the right and does not block this step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at row 06 column D, one cell ahead of my current position at row 07 column D. The forward cell is the goal and is safe to enter, so I should move forward immediately.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
